realizationMethod.combinatorial: induced vertex map is a simplicial automorphism (edge + face + cell sets preserved)
realizationMethod.numeric: S_B(pushforward connection) == S_B, orientation-gauge carried at the operator boundary (phase448/452 Faces[f][0] non-covariance record)

translationGroup.note: established exactly translation-covariant by phase448 (n=4 covariance 1.4e-14); momentum labels k in (Z_4)^4

realizedPointGroup.derivation: signed permutations preserving the Kuhn body-diagonal structure; a signed permutation preserves the CFK triangulation iff it preserves the distinguished long diagonal (1,1,1,1) up to sign -> all-equal sign patterns only (pure axis permutations S_4 and the central element), consistent with the enumerated realized set

restFrameLittleGroup.definition: point elements fixing the Euclidean-time axis 0 forward (A e_time = +e_time)

parity.ruling: NO realized improper element implements spatial inversion (Kuhn body-diagonal broken by spatial reflection); parity (P) is NOT a good quantum number -> pseudoscalar '0-+-like' channel labels are BANNED; channels labeled by realized irreps only
parity.improperSpatialCaveat: axis-swap elements act with 3D spatial determinant -1 but do NOT implement spatial inversion; they are cubic/permutation irreps of H_s, not a parity operation, and confer no P label

irrepChannelTable.note: channel labels from REALIZED irreps of H_s ONLY; no J^{PC} parity label emitted (parity inadmissible)

nonTrivialLinearIrrep.label: A2-like (sign character of H_s; realized, non-parity)

identityIrrep2x2Gevp.description: identity-irrep (A1) zero-spatial-momentum kernel for the 2x2 GEVP variational basis {O1=Tr(F^2), O2=Tr(Upsilon^2)}; both interpolators use the trivial (all-ones) face-type weight -> the covariant time-slice sum; exact rational uniform weight
identityIrrep2x2Gevp.gevp: solve C(t) v = lambda C(t0) v on the 2x2 {O1,O2} connected correlator matrix; ground-state a*m from the dominant generalized eigenvalue; t0 pinned mechanically (see manifest AIC rule)

nonIdentityChannel.description: A2-like realized channel kernel over face types: P_chi = (1/|H_s|) sum_g chi(g) rho_facetype(g); exact rational (integer numerators over |H_s|). Requires per-face-type (=> per-site) resolution, NOT the plain slice sum.

dispersionRow.kMin: 2*pi/4 (one spatial momentum unit on the n=4 torus; = pi/2 per spatial axis)
dispersionRow.spec: O(k,tau) = sum over faces in slice tau of e^{-i k . x_base(f)} * density(f); measure a*m(k_min) and check the lattice cosh dispersion vs the k=0 gap

perSiteCorrelatorStorage.reason: the non-identity channel projector and the k_min dispersion row both require un-slice-summed per-site (per-face) correlators; committed phase452 outputs are slice-summed, so retroactive extraction is impossible (standing item 12)

mandatoryFraming: workbench-relative structure data only; su(2) toy algebra, reduced Spin(4) slice, lattice units; nothing promoted; promotedPhysicalMassClaimCount=0
